mapper.insert: insert into device (name, type, model, serial_number, group_id, unit, contact, contact_phone, location, latitude, longitude, status, ip, port, connection_type, firmware_version, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{type}, #{model}, #{serialNumber}, #{groupId}, #{unit}, #{contact}, #{contactPhone}, #{location}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 0, #{ip}, #{port}, #{connectionType}, #{firmwareVersion}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update device set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, model = #{model}, group_id = #{groupId}, unit = #{unit}, contact = #{contact}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, location = #{location}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, ip = #{ip}, port = #{port}, connection_type = #{connectionType}, firmware_version = #{firmwareVersion}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update device set status = #{status}, last_online_time = #{lastOnlineTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
